title: Chris Mason: Burnham is fifth PM in four years - now he'll try to buck the trend
description: Determined to hit the ground running, the former mayor hopes to maintain the leadership style he adopted in Manchester.
summary: Former mayor Chris Mason has become the fifth Prime Minister in four years, with a goal of breaking the trend of frequent leadership changes. He aims to maintain his leadership style, which was effective in Manchester.

title: Victory for football? Spain beat Argentina to win World Cup
description: It might seem like a trite cliche, but you won't find many neutrals disagreeing with that verdict on the World Cup final.
summary: Spain won the World Cup by beating Argentina in the final, with their victory being widely celebrated. The match marked a significant moment in the tournament. The outcome was met with little disagreement from spectators.

title: Moment fans in Madrid celebrate World Cup win
description: Thousands of spectators watched Spain's victory in central Madrid on late Sunday night.
summary: Thousands of fans in Madrid celebrated Spain's World Cup win on Sunday night, with many spectators gathering in the city center to watch the match. The victory marked a significant moment for Spanish football enthusiasts.

title: US soldier killed and one injured after Iranian attack in Iraq
description: The US military reports another death a day after two of its soldiers were killed in Jordan.
summary: A US soldier was killed and another injured in an Iranian attack in Iraq, following a previous incident in Jordan where two US soldiers were killed. The US military has reported another casualty. The incident highlights ongoing tensions in the region.

title: My fitness tracker knew I was pregnant before I did
description: Ravika is one of hundreds of women who are noticing early pregnancy signs through the data on their fitness trackers.
summary: A growing number of women are discovering early signs of pregnancy through data on their fitness trackers, with some noticing changes before they even realize they are pregnant. This phenomenon has been reported by hundreds of women. Fitness trackers are providing valuable insights into women's health.

title: ‘Everyone's afraid to die’: Struggle to recruit soldiers in Ukraine turns violent
description: Aggression against recruitment officers has become increasingly threatening, police say.
summary: Ukraine is struggling to recruit soldiers, with recruitment officers facing violent aggression from those who are hesitant to join the military, according to police reports. This has raised concerns about the country's military capabilities. The situation has become increasingly dire, with many people afraid to die in the ongoing conflict.

title: Fire crews battle blaze on Arthur’s Seat in Edinburgh
description: A huge plume of smoke could be seen from as far away as Fife on Sunday evening.
summary: Fire crews battled a blaze on Arthur's Seat in Edinburgh, producing a large plume of smoke visible from Fife. The incident occurred on Sunday evening. Details of the cause and extent of the fire are not provided.

title: The 1975's Matty Healy marries model Gabbriette Bechtel in Los Angeles
description: The newlyweds were first linked in 2023 after Healy's brief relationship with Taylor Swift.
summary: Matty Healy from the band The 1975 has married model Gabbriette Bechtel in Los Angeles, following a brief relationship with Taylor Swift in 2023. The couple's marriage marks a new chapter in Healy's personal life. Details of the wedding have not been disclosed.

title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
description: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.
summary: Russia has launched a major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities, resulting in eight deaths and dozens of injuries. The attack comes as Ukraine continues its assault on Russian infrastructure. The situation remains tense in the region.

title: Thames Water lenders preparing legal challenge in event of Burnham nationalisation
description: The BBC understands creditors would would pursue payment in full of the outstanding debts, in the multi-billions of pounds.
summary: Thames Water lenders are preparing a legal challenge in case of the company's nationalisation, seeking full payment of their outstanding debts, which are estimated to be in the multi-billions of pounds.
